articles.author: Sebastian Shukla
articles.title: Switzerland’s ‘Brexit moment’: Vote on a population cap sets up potential collision with EU - CNN
articles.description: Switzerland will vote in a referendum Sunday on limiting its population size – a proposal that could, if approved, set the country at odds with the European Union.
articles.content:
Summary
  • Switzerland votes Sunday on capping its population at 10 million, a proposal that could set the country on a collision course with the European Union.
